subcodes.first_line: Thy letter reached the Wronged One in the Most Great Prison, and its summit was adorned with the crown of utterance of the Lord of all possibility. Praise be to God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتابت در سجن اعظم بنظر مظلوم رسید و راس آن باکلیل بیان مالک امکان مزین گشت الحمد لله
subcodes.subjects: @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @praise and encouragement
